title: [BUG] TS7016: Could not find a declaration file for module './dist/es5'.
author: swierzbicki
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

Angular 13.x 

During ng build there is an error: 
```
TS7016: Could not find a declaration file for module './dist/es5'. 'node_modules/exceljs/dist/es5/index.js' implicitly has an 'any' type.
```
![CleanShot 2023-11-02 at 11 24 22](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/7196324/595f1d75-82da-4fe8-b5db-1e98f8b54f16)

![CleanShot 2023-11-02 at 11 27 11](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/assets/7196324/7287f228-1195-49ba-bc48-465eeac298da)

**Lib version:** 4.4.0
 **typescript**: 4.5.5



## The expected behaviour:

No error during building Angular app

comments.author: leokraemer
comments.body:
Solution was not to import * but just what I needed. E.g.:

`import { Cell, Workbook , RowMap} from "exceljs";`
